weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by a total of 20 findings, with 14 unique CVEs tracked across various domains, including Containers, Crypto Libraries, and Web Servers. The most frequently seen CVEs, each occurring once, include CVE-2026-35527, CVE-2026-0300, and several others, highlighting a diverse threat environment. Notably, the majority of these CVEs were observed on a single day, 2026-05-06, which was the most active day, suggesting a potential surge in vulnerability exploitation attempts, warranting continued vigilance across our infrastructure.
